summary: Tested Gap 7 (Account Deletion endpoint + Settings UI modal) and Gap 8 (Board PDF Export endpoint + Board page PDF button). All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All UI tests passed including modal interaction, DELETE text validation, cancel-closes-modal, PDF button shows 'Generating...', POST API call verified, CSV regression confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: DELETE /auth/account: Returns 401/403 without auth (correct). Endpoint correctly structured with dependency-ordered child table deletions before account row deletion.
POST /board/export-pdf: Returns Content-Type: application/pdf, Content-Disposition: attachment, valid %PDF bytes, >1KB. Endpoint uses reportlab StreamingResponse correctly.

CoachSettingsPage.js: delete-account-btn opens modal, delete-confirm-input requires exact 'DELETE' text, confirm button disabled until correct text, cancel closes modal. All data-testid attributes present.

CoachBoardPage.js: export-pdf-btn shows 'Generating...' during fetch, uses POST to /api/coach/board/export-pdf (not window.print()), returns to 'PDF' after completion. Old print-board-btn no longer present. CSV button still present alongside PDF.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gap 7 fully verified: DELETE /auth/account returns 401/403 without auth (endpoint exists). Settings page has delete-account-btn (red), delete-account-modal, delete-confirm-input, delete-account-confirm-btn (disabled until 'DELETE' typed), delete-account-cancel-btn closes modal. Gap 8 fully verified: POST /board/export-pdf returns 200 + application/pdf + attachment + valid PDF bytes >1KB. Board page has export-pdf-btn (shows 'Generating...' during fetch, uses POST not print), export-csv-btn still present. Regression: coach login, data-export, settings page all working.
